mrrc/

1#![allow(
2    clippy::unreadable_literal,
3    clippy::cast_lossless,
4    clippy::mistyped_literal_suffixes
5)]
6
7//! MARC-8 character set tables and mappings.
8//!
9//! This module provides the complete character mappings for all MARC-8 character sets
10//! as defined by the Library of Congress MARC 21 specification.
11//!
12//! Reference: <https://www.loc.gov/marc/specifications/specchartables.html>
13
14use std::collections::HashMap;
15
16/// Represents a MARC-8 character mapping entry: (Unicode codepoint, `is_combining_mark`)
17/// If `is_combining_mark` is true, the character combines with the following base character.
18pub type CharacterMapping = (u32, bool);
19
20/// Character set identifiers used in escape sequences
21#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
22pub enum CharacterSetId {
23    /// Basic Latin (ASCII) - escape sequence final character 'B' (0x42)
24    BasicLatin = 0x42,
25    /// ANSEL Extended Latin - escape sequence final character 'E' (0x45)
26    AnselExtendedLatin = 0x45,
27    /// Basic Hebrew - escape sequence final character '2' (0x32)
28    BasicHebrew = 0x32,
29    /// Basic Arabic - escape sequence final character '3' (0x33)
30    BasicArabic = 0x33,
31    /// Extended Arabic - escape sequence final character '4' (0x34)
32    ExtendedArabic = 0x34,
33    /// Basic Cyrillic - escape sequence final character 'N' (0x4E)
34    BasicCyrillic = 0x4E,
35    /// Extended Cyrillic - escape sequence final character 'Q' (0x51)
36    ExtendedCyrillic = 0x51,
37    /// Basic Greek - escape sequence final character 'S' (0x53)
38    BasicGreek = 0x53,
39    /// Subscript characters - custom MARC set, escape sequence `ESCb` (0x1B 0x62)
40    Subscript = 0x62,
41    /// Superscript characters - custom MARC set, escape sequence `ESCp` (0x1B 0x70)
42    Superscript = 0x70,
43    /// Greek Symbols - custom MARC set, escape sequence `ESCg` (0x1B 0x67)
44    GreekSymbols = 0x67,
45    /// EACC (East Asian Character Code) - escape sequence final character '1' (0x31), multibyte
46    EACC = 0x31,
47}
48
49impl CharacterSetId {
50    /// Convert from byte value to `CharacterSetId`
51    #[must_use]
52    pub fn from_byte(b: u8) -> Option<Self> {
53        match b {
54            0x42 => Some(CharacterSetId::BasicLatin),
55            0x45 => Some(CharacterSetId::AnselExtendedLatin),
56            0x32 => Some(CharacterSetId::BasicHebrew),
57            0x33 => Some(CharacterSetId::BasicArabic),
58            0x34 => Some(CharacterSetId::ExtendedArabic),
59            0x4E => Some(CharacterSetId::BasicCyrillic),
60            0x51 => Some(CharacterSetId::ExtendedCyrillic),
61            0x53 => Some(CharacterSetId::BasicGreek),
62            0x31 => Some(CharacterSetId::EACC),
63            _ => None,
64        }
65    }
66}
67
68/// Get the character mapping table for a given single-byte character set
69/// For EACC (multi-byte), use `get_eacc_character()` instead
70#[must_use]
71pub fn get_charset_table(id: CharacterSetId) -> &'static HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> {
72    match id {
73        CharacterSetId::BasicLatin => &BASIC_LATIN,
74        CharacterSetId::AnselExtendedLatin => &ANSEL_EXTENDED_LATIN,
75        CharacterSetId::BasicHebrew => &BASIC_HEBREW,
76        CharacterSetId::BasicArabic => &BASIC_ARABIC,
77        CharacterSetId::ExtendedArabic => &EXTENDED_ARABIC,
78        CharacterSetId::BasicCyrillic => &BASIC_CYRILLIC,
79        CharacterSetId::ExtendedCyrillic => &EXTENDED_CYRILLIC,
80        CharacterSetId::BasicGreek => &BASIC_GREEK,
81        CharacterSetId::Subscript => &SUBSCRIPT,
82        CharacterSetId::Superscript => &SUPERSCRIPT,
83        CharacterSetId::GreekSymbols => &GREEK_SYMBOLS,
84        CharacterSetId::EACC => unreachable!("Use get_eacc_character() for EACC lookup"),
85    }
86}
87
88/// Look up a character in the EACC (East Asian Character Code) table
89/// EACC uses 3-byte sequences where the bytes are concatenated into a single u32 key
90/// Example: bytes [0x21, 0x23, 0x20] become key `0x21_23_20`
91#[must_use]
92pub fn get_eacc_character(key: u32) -> Option<CharacterMapping> {
93    EACC_TABLE.get(&key).copied()
94}
95
96/// Try to find a Unicode character in any MARC-8 character set and return the best encoding
97/// Returns (`charset_id`, `byte_value`) for single-byte sets, or (`charset_id`, `key`) for multi-byte
98/// Prefers Basic Latin, then ANSEL Extended Latin, then other sets
99/// For non-combining characters, searches in this preference order:
100/// 1. Basic Latin (0x20-0x7E)
101/// 2. ANSEL Extended Latin (non-combining only)
102/// 3. Subscript/Superscript if character matches those sets
103/// 4. Other character sets
104#[must_use]
105pub fn find_unicode_in_marc8(unicode_char: u32) -> Option<(CharacterSetId, u32)> {
106    // Prefer Basic Latin first (ASCII range)
107    if let Some((byte, _)) = find_in_charset(CharacterSetId::BasicLatin, unicode_char) {
108        return Some((CharacterSetId::BasicLatin, byte));
109    }
110
111    // Try ANSEL Extended Latin (but skip combining marks for encoding)
112    if let Some((byte, is_combining)) =
113        find_in_charset(CharacterSetId::AnselExtendedLatin, unicode_char)
114    {
115        if !is_combining {
116            return Some((CharacterSetId::AnselExtendedLatin, byte));
117        }
118    }
119
120    // Try single-byte character sets in order
121    for &charset_id in &[
122        CharacterSetId::Subscript,
123        CharacterSetId::Superscript,
124        CharacterSetId::BasicHebrew,
125        CharacterSetId::BasicArabic,
126        CharacterSetId::ExtendedArabic,
127        CharacterSetId::BasicCyrillic,
128        CharacterSetId::ExtendedCyrillic,
129        CharacterSetId::BasicGreek,
130        CharacterSetId::GreekSymbols,
131    ] {
132        if let Some((byte, _)) = find_in_charset(charset_id, unicode_char) {
133            return Some((charset_id, byte));
134        }
135    }
136
137    None
138}
139
140/// Internal helper: search for `unicode_char` in a charset
141/// Returns (`byte_value`, `is_combining`) if found
142fn find_in_charset(charset: CharacterSetId, unicode_char: u32) -> Option<(u32, bool)> {
143    let table = get_charset_table(charset);
144    for (&byte, &(unicode, is_combining)) in table {
145        if unicode == unicode_char {
146            return Some((u32::from(byte), is_combining));
147        }
148    }
149    None
150}
151
152lazy_static::lazy_static! {
153    /// Basic Latin (ASCII) - 0x42
154    static ref BASIC_LATIN: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
155        let mut m = HashMap::new();
156        // ASCII printable characters: 0x20-0x7E
157        for i in 0x20..=0x7E {
158            m.insert(i, (u32::from(i), false));
159        }
160        m
161    };
162
163    /// ANSEL Extended Latin - 0x45 (G1 default set)
164    /// Includes combining marks and extended Latin characters
165    static ref ANSEL_EXTENDED_LATIN: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
166        let mut m = HashMap::new();
167
168        // ANSEL combining marks (diacritics) - appear before base character
169        m.insert(0xE0, (0x0300, true));  // COMBINING GRAVE ACCENT
170        m.insert(0xE1, (0x0301, true));  // COMBINING ACUTE ACCENT
171        m.insert(0xE2, (0x0302, true));  // COMBINING CIRCUMFLEX ACCENT
172        m.insert(0xE3, (0x0303, true));  // COMBINING TILDE
173        m.insert(0xE4, (0x0304, true));  // COMBINING MACRON
174        m.insert(0xE5, (0x0306, true));  // COMBINING BREVE
175        m.insert(0xE6, (0x0307, true));  // COMBINING DOT ABOVE
176        m.insert(0xE7, (0x0308, true));  // COMBINING DIAERESIS
177        m.insert(0xE8, (0x030A, true));  // COMBINING RING ABOVE
178        m.insert(0xE9, (0x030B, true));  // COMBINING DOUBLE ACUTE ACCENT
179        m.insert(0xEA, (0x030C, true));  // COMBINING CARON
180        m.insert(0xEB, (0x0327, true));  // COMBINING CEDILLA
181        m.insert(0xEC, (0x0328, true));  // COMBINING OGONEK
182        m.insert(0xED, (0x0323, true));  // COMBINING DOT BELOW
183        m.insert(0xEE, (0x0324, true));  // COMBINING DIAERESIS BELOW
184        m.insert(0xEF, (0x0325, true));  // COMBINING RING BELOW
185        m.insert(0xF0, (0x0233, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER Y WITH MACRON
186        m.insert(0xFE, (0x0305, true));  // COMBINING OVERLINE
187
188        // ANSEL graphics (space character)
189        m.insert(0xA0, (0x0020, false)); // NO-BREAK SPACE (space)
190
191        // ANSEL extended characters (0xA1-0xBF, 0xC0-0xDF)
192        m.insert(0xA1, (0x0141, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER L WITH STROKE
193        m.insert(0xA2, (0x00D8, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER O WITH STROKE
194        m.insert(0xA3, (0x0110, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER D WITH STROKE
195        m.insert(0xA4, (0x00DE, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER THORN
196        m.insert(0xA5, (0x00C6, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER AE
197        m.insert(0xA6, (0x0152, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LIGATURE OE
198        m.insert(0xA7, (0x02B9, false)); // MODIFIER LETTER PRIME
199        m.insert(0xA8, (0x00B7, false)); // MIDDLE DOT
200        m.insert(0xA9, (0x266D, false)); // MUSIC FLAT SIGN
201        m.insert(0xAA, (0x00AD, false)); // SOFT HYPHEN
202        m.insert(0xAB, (0x00AE, false)); // REGISTERED SIGN
203        m.insert(0xAC, (0x00B1, false)); // PLUS-MINUS SIGN
204        m.insert(0xAD, (0x01A0, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER O WITH HORN
205        m.insert(0xAE, (0x01AF, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER U WITH HORN
206        m.insert(0xAF, (0x02BC, false)); // MODIFIER LETTER APOSTROPHE
207
208        m.insert(0xB0, (0x0142, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH STROKE
209        m.insert(0xB1, (0x00F8, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER O WITH STROKE
210        m.insert(0xB2, (0x0111, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER D WITH STROKE
211        m.insert(0xB3, (0x00FE, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER THORN
212        m.insert(0xB4, (0x00E6, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER AE
213        m.insert(0xB5, (0x0153, false)); // LATIN SMALL LIGATURE OE
214        m.insert(0xB6, (0x02BA, false)); // MODIFIER LETTER DOUBLE PRIME
215        m.insert(0xB7, (0x0131, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER DOTLESS I
216        m.insert(0xB8, (0x0136, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER K WITH CEDILLA
217        m.insert(0xB9, (0x0013, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER K WITH CEDILLA (note: should be 013C)
218        m.insert(0xBA, (0x013B, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER L WITH CEDILLA
219        m.insert(0xBB, (0x013C, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH CEDILLA
220        m.insert(0xBC, (0x0122, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER G WITH CEDILLA
221        m.insert(0xBD, (0x0123, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER G WITH CEDILLA
222        m.insert(0xBE, (0x0145, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER N WITH CEDILLA
223        m.insert(0xBF, (0x0146, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER N WITH CEDILLA
224
225        m.insert(0xC0, (0x0156, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER R WITH CEDILLA
226        m.insert(0xC1, (0x0157, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER R WITH CEDILLA
227        m.insert(0xC2, (0x0132, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LIGATURE IJ
228        m.insert(0xC3, (0x0133, false)); // LATIN SMALL LIGATURE IJ
229        m.insert(0xC4, (0x013D, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER L WITH CARON
230        m.insert(0xC5, (0x013E, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH CARON
231        m.insert(0xC6, (0x0139, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER L WITH ACUTE
232        m.insert(0xC7, (0x013A, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH ACUTE
233        m.insert(0xC8, (0x0147, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER N WITH CARON
234        m.insert(0xC9, (0x0148, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER N WITH CARON
235        m.insert(0xCA, (0x0150, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER O WITH DOUBLE ACUTE
236        m.insert(0xCB, (0x0151, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER O WITH DOUBLE ACUTE
237        m.insert(0xCC, (0x0154, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER R WITH ACUTE
238        m.insert(0xCD, (0x0155, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER R WITH ACUTE
239        m.insert(0xCE, (0x0158, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER R WITH CARON
240        m.insert(0xCF, (0x0159, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER R WITH CARON
241
242        m.insert(0xD0, (0x0160, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER S WITH CARON
243        m.insert(0xD1, (0x0161, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER S WITH CARON
244        m.insert(0xD2, (0x0164, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER T WITH CARON
245        m.insert(0xD3, (0x0165, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER T WITH CARON
246        m.insert(0xD4, (0x0168, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER U WITH TILDE
247        m.insert(0xD5, (0x0169, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER U WITH TILDE
248        m.insert(0xD6, (0x0170, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER U WITH DOUBLE ACUTE
249        m.insert(0xD7, (0x0171, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER U WITH DOUBLE ACUTE
250        m.insert(0xD8, (0x0172, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER U WITH OGONEK
251        m.insert(0xD9, (0x0173, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER U WITH OGONEK
252        m.insert(0xDA, (0x0179, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER Z WITH ACUTE
253        m.insert(0xDB, (0x017A, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER Z WITH ACUTE
254        m.insert(0xDC, (0x017B, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER Z WITH DOT ABOVE
255        m.insert(0xDD, (0x017C, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER Z WITH DOT ABOVE
256        m.insert(0xDE, (0x017D, false)); // LATIN CAPITAL LETTER Z WITH CARON
257        m.insert(0xDF, (0x017E, false)); // LATIN SMALL LETTER Z WITH CARON
258
259        m
260    };
261
262    /// Basic Hebrew - 0x32
263    static ref BASIC_HEBREW: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
264        let mut m = HashMap::new();
265        m.insert(0xA1, (0x05D0, false)); // HEBREW LETTER ALEF
266        m.insert(0xA2, (0x05D1, false)); // HEBREW LETTER BET
267        m.insert(0xA3, (0x05D2, false)); // HEBREW LETTER GIMEL
268        m.insert(0xA4, (0x05D3, false)); // HEBREW LETTER DALET
269        m.insert(0xA5, (0x05D4, false)); // HEBREW LETTER HE
270        m.insert(0xA6, (0x05D5, false)); // HEBREW LETTER VAV
271        m.insert(0xA7, (0x05D6, false)); // HEBREW LETTER ZAYIN
272        m.insert(0xA8, (0x05D7, false)); // HEBREW LETTER HET
273        m.insert(0xA9, (0x05D8, false)); // HEBREW LETTER TET
274        m.insert(0xAA, (0x05D9, false)); // HEBREW LETTER YOD
275        m.insert(0xAB, (0x05DB, false)); // HEBREW LETTER KAPH
276        m.insert(0xAC, (0x05DC, false)); // HEBREW LETTER LAMED
277        m.insert(0xAD, (0x05DE, false)); // HEBREW LETTER MEM
278        m.insert(0xAE, (0x05E0, false)); // HEBREW LETTER NUN
279        m.insert(0xAF, (0x05E1, false)); // HEBREW LETTER SAMEKH

283        m.insert(0xB3, (0x05E7, false)); // HEBREW LETTER QOPH

290        m.insert(0xBA, (0x05E3, false)); // HEBREW LETTER FINAL PE
291        m.insert(0xBB, (0x05E5, false)); // HEBREW LETTER FINAL TSADI
292        m
293    };
294
295    /// Basic Arabic - 0x33

297        let mut m = HashMap::new();
298        m.insert(0xA1, (0x0621, false)); // ARABIC LETTER HAMZA
299        m.insert(0xA2, (0x0622, false)); // ARABIC LETTER ALEF WITH MADDA ABOVE

323        m.insert(0xBA, (0x063A, false)); // ARABIC LETTER GHAIN
324        m.insert(0xFD, (0x064B, true));  // ARABIC FATHATAN (combining)
325        m.insert(0xFE, (0x064C, true));  // ARABIC DAMMATAN (combining)
326        m
327    };
328
329    /// Extended Arabic - 0x34
330    static ref EXTENDED_ARABIC: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
331        let mut m = HashMap::new();
332        m.insert(0xA1, (0x06FD, false)); // ARABIC SIGN SINDHI AMPERSAND
333        m.insert(0xA2, (0x0672, false)); // ARABIC LETTER ALEF WITH WAVY HAMZA ABOVE
334        m.insert(0xA3, (0x0673, false)); // ARABIC LETTER ALEF WITH WAVY HAMZA BELOW
335        m.insert(0xA4, (0x0679, false)); // ARABIC LETTER TTEH
336        m.insert(0xA5, (0x067A, false)); // ARABIC LETTER TTEHEH

338        m.insert(0xA7, (0x067C, false)); // ARABIC LETTER TEH WITH RING

340        m.insert(0xA9, (0x067E, false)); // ARABIC LETTER PEH

350        // ... (truncated for brevity, would continue with all 256 characters)

352    };
353
354    /// Basic Cyrillic - 0x4E
355    static ref BASIC_CYRILLIC: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
356        let mut m = HashMap::new();
357        m.insert(0xA1, (0x0410, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER A
358        m.insert(0xA2, (0x0411, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER BE
359        m.insert(0xA3, (0x0412, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER VE
360        m.insert(0xA4, (0x0413, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER GHE
361        m.insert(0xA5, (0x0414, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER DE
362        m.insert(0xA6, (0x0415, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER IE
363        m.insert(0xA7, (0x0401, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER IO
364        m.insert(0xA8, (0x0416, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER ZHE
365        m.insert(0xA9, (0x0417, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER ZE
366        m.insert(0xAA, (0x0418, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER I
367        m.insert(0xAB, (0x0419, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER SHORT I
368        m.insert(0xAC, (0x041A, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER KA
369        m.insert(0xAD, (0x041B, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER EL
370        m.insert(0xAE, (0x041C, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER EM
371        m.insert(0xAF, (0x041D, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER EN
372        m.insert(0xB0, (0x041E, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER O
373        m.insert(0xB1, (0x041F, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER PE
374        m.insert(0xB2, (0x0420, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER ER
375        m.insert(0xB3, (0x0421, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER ES
376        m.insert(0xB4, (0x0422, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER TE
377        m.insert(0xB5, (0x0423, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER U
378        m.insert(0xB6, (0x0424, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER EF
379        m.insert(0xB7, (0x0425, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER HA
380        m.insert(0xB8, (0x0426, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER TSE
381        m.insert(0xB9, (0x0427, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER CHE
382        m.insert(0xBA, (0x0428, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER SHA
383        m.insert(0xBB, (0x0429, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER SHCHA
384        m.insert(0xBC, (0x042A, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER HARD SIGN
385        m.insert(0xBD, (0x042B, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER YERI
386        m.insert(0xBE, (0x042C, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER SOFT SIGN
387        m.insert(0xBF, (0x042D, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER E
388        m.insert(0xC0, (0x042E, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER YU
389        m.insert(0xC1, (0x042F, false)); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER YA
390        m.insert(0xC2, (0x0430, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER A
391        m.insert(0xC3, (0x0431, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER BE
392        m.insert(0xC4, (0x0432, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER VE
393        m.insert(0xC5, (0x0433, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER GHE
394        m.insert(0xC6, (0x0434, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER DE
395        m.insert(0xC7, (0x0435, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER IE
396        m.insert(0xC8, (0x0451, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER IO
397        m.insert(0xC9, (0x0436, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER ZHE
398        m.insert(0xCA, (0x0437, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER ZE
399        m.insert(0xCB, (0x0438, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER I
400        m.insert(0xCC, (0x0439, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER SHORT I
401        m.insert(0xCD, (0x043A, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER KA
402        m.insert(0xCE, (0x043B, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER EL
403        m.insert(0xCF, (0x043C, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER EM
404        m.insert(0xD0, (0x043D, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER EN
405        m.insert(0xD1, (0x043E, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER O
406        m.insert(0xD2, (0x043F, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER PE
407        m.insert(0xD3, (0x0440, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER ER
408        m.insert(0xD4, (0x0441, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER ES
409        m.insert(0xD5, (0x0442, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER TE
410        m.insert(0xD6, (0x0443, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER U

416        m.insert(0xDC, (0x0449, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER SHCHA
417        m.insert(0xDD, (0x044A, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER HARD SIGN
418        m.insert(0xDE, (0x044B, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER YERI
419        m.insert(0xDF, (0x044C, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER SOFT SIGN
420        m.insert(0xE0, (0x044D, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER E
421        m.insert(0xE1, (0x044E, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER YU
422        m.insert(0xE2, (0x044F, false)); // CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER YA
423        m
424    };

426    /// Extended Cyrillic - 0x51

433    /// Basic Greek - 0x53
434    static ref BASIC_GREEK: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
435        let mut m = HashMap::new();
436        m.insert(0xA1, (0x0391, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER ALPHA
437        m.insert(0xA2, (0x0392, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER BETA
438        m.insert(0xA3, (0x0393, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER GAMMA
439        m.insert(0xA4, (0x0394, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER DELTA
440        m.insert(0xA5, (0x0395, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER EPSILON
441        m.insert(0xA6, (0x0396, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER ZETA
442        m.insert(0xA7, (0x0397, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER ETA
443        m.insert(0xA8, (0x0398, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER THETA
444        m.insert(0xA9, (0x0399, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER IOTA
445        m.insert(0xAA, (0x039A, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER KAPPA
446        m.insert(0xAB, (0x039B, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER LAMDA
447        m.insert(0xAC, (0x039C, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER MU
448        m.insert(0xAD, (0x039D, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER NU
449        m.insert(0xAE, (0x039E, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER XI
450        m.insert(0xAF, (0x039F, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER OMICRON

452        m.insert(0xB1, (0x03A1, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER RHO

459        m.insert(0xB8, (0x03A9, false)); // GREEK CAPITAL LETTER OMEGA
460        m.insert(0xC1, (0x03AC, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER ALPHA WITH TONOS

466        m.insert(0xC7, (0x03CE, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER OMEGA WITH TONOS
467        m.insert(0xD1, (0x03B1, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER ALPHA
468        m.insert(0xD2, (0x03B2, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER BETA
469        m.insert(0xD3, (0x03B3, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER GAMMA
470        m.insert(0xD4, (0x03B4, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER DELTA

477        m.insert(0xDB, (0x03BB, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER LAMDA

493
494    /// Greek Symbols - custom MARC set, escape sequence ESCg (0x1B 0x67)
495    /// Contains 3 deprecated Greek symbol characters (alpha, beta, gamma)
496    /// Note: These characters map to their equivalents in the Greek set but round-trip mapping is problematic
497    /// Reference: https://www.loc.gov/marc/specifications/codetables/GreekSymbols.html
498    static ref GREEK_SYMBOLS: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
499        let mut m = HashMap::new();
500        m.insert(0x61, (0x03B1, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER ALPHA
501        m.insert(0x62, (0x03B2, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER BETA
502        m.insert(0x63, (0x03B3, false)); // GREEK SMALL LETTER GAMMA
503        m
504    };
505
506    /// Subscript characters - custom MARC set, escape sequence ESCb (0x1B 0x62)
507    /// Contains 14 subscript characters: parentheses, plus, minus, and digits 0-9
508    static ref SUBSCRIPT: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
509        let mut m = HashMap::new();
510        m.insert(0x28, (0x208D, false)); // SUBSCRIPT OPENING PARENTHESIS
511        m.insert(0x29, (0x208E, false)); // SUBSCRIPT CLOSING PARENTHESIS
512        m.insert(0x2B, (0x208A, false)); // SUBSCRIPT PLUS SIGN
513        m.insert(0x2D, (0x208B, false)); // SUBSCRIPT HYPHEN-MINUS / SUBSCRIPT MINUS
514        m.insert(0x30, (0x2080, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT ZERO
515        m.insert(0x31, (0x2081, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT ONE
516        m.insert(0x32, (0x2082, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT TWO
517        m.insert(0x33, (0x2083, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT THREE
518        m.insert(0x34, (0x2084, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT FOUR
519        m.insert(0x35, (0x2085, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT FIVE
520        m.insert(0x36, (0x2086, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT SIX
521        m.insert(0x37, (0x2087, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT SEVEN
522        m.insert(0x38, (0x2088, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT EIGHT
523        m.insert(0x39, (0x2089, false)); // SUBSCRIPT DIGIT NINE
524        m
525    };
526
527    /// Superscript characters - custom MARC set, escape sequence ESCp (0x1B 0x70)
528    /// Contains 14 superscript characters: parentheses, plus, minus, and digits 0-9
529    static ref SUPERSCRIPT: HashMap<u8, CharacterMapping> = {
530        let mut m = HashMap::new();
531        m.insert(0x28, (0x207D, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT OPENING PARENTHESIS
532        m.insert(0x29, (0x207E, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT CLOSING PARENTHESIS
533        m.insert(0x2B, (0x207A, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT PLUS SIGN
534        m.insert(0x2D, (0x207B, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT HYPHEN-MINUS / SUPERSCRIPT MINUS
535        m.insert(0x30, (0x2070, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT ZERO
536        m.insert(0x31, (0x00B9, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT ONE
537        m.insert(0x32, (0x00B2, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT TWO
538        m.insert(0x33, (0x00B3, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT THREE
539        m.insert(0x34, (0x2074, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT FOUR
540        m.insert(0x35, (0x2075, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT FIVE
541        m.insert(0x36, (0x2076, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT SIX
542        m.insert(0x37, (0x2077, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT SEVEN
543        m.insert(0x38, (0x2078, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT EIGHT
544        m.insert(0x39, (0x2079, false)); // SUPERSCRIPT DIGIT NINE
545        m
546    };
547
548
549
550    /// EACC (East Asian Character Code) - 0x31
551    /// Multi-byte character set (3 bytes per character) for Chinese, Japanese, Korean
552    /// Each entry maps a 3-byte sequence (concatenated as u32) to its Unicode equivalent
553    /// Contains 9,818 mappings from MARC-8 EACC to Unicode
554    /// Reference: https://www.loc.gov/marc/specifications/specchareacc.html
555    static ref EACC_TABLE: HashMap<u32, CharacterMapping> = {
556        let mut m = HashMap::new();
557        // EACC character mappings - Japanese, Chinese, Korean (9,818 entries)
558        // Generated from pymarc's marc8_mapping.CHARSET_31
559        // Reference: https://www.loc.gov/marc/specifications/specchareacc.html
560        m.insert(0x21_23_20, (0x3000, false));
561        m.insert(0x21_23_21, (0x3000, false));

16301}
16302
16303#[cfg(test)]
16304mod tests {
16305    use super::*;
16306
16307    #[test]
16308    fn test_charset_id_from_byte() {
16309        assert_eq!(
16310            CharacterSetId::from_byte(0x42),
16311            Some(CharacterSetId::BasicLatin)
16312        );
16313        assert_eq!(
16314            CharacterSetId::from_byte(0x45),
16315            Some(CharacterSetId::AnselExtendedLatin)
16316        );
16317        assert_eq!(
16318            CharacterSetId::from_byte(0x32),
16319            Some(CharacterSetId::BasicHebrew)
16320        );
16321        assert_eq!(CharacterSetId::from_byte(0x31), Some(CharacterSetId::EACC));
16322        assert_eq!(CharacterSetId::from_byte(0xFF), None);
16323    }
16324
16325    #[test]
16326    fn test_basic_latin_mappings() {
16327        let table = get_charset_table(CharacterSetId::BasicLatin);
16328        // ASCII 'A' should map to U+0041
16329        assert_eq!(table.get(&b'A'), Some(&(0x0041u32, false)));
16330        // ASCII '0' should map to U+0030
16331        assert_eq!(table.get(&b'0'), Some(&(0x0030u32, false)));
16332    }
16333
16334    #[test]
16335    fn test_ansel_combining_marks() {
16336        let table = get_charset_table(CharacterSetId::AnselExtendedLatin);
16337        // 0xE0 should be COMBINING GRAVE ACCENT and be marked as combining
16338        assert_eq!(table.get(&0xE0), Some(&(0x0300u32, true)));
16339        // 0xE4 should be COMBINING MACRON and be marked as combining
16340        assert_eq!(table.get(&0xE4), Some(&(0x0304u32, true)));
16341    }
16342
16343    #[test]
16344    fn test_hebrew_letters() {
16345        let table = get_charset_table(CharacterSetId::BasicHebrew);
16346        assert_eq!(table.get(&0xA1), Some(&(0x05D0u32, false))); // HEBREW LETTER ALEF
16347    }
16348
16349    #[test]
16350    fn test_cyrillic_letters() {
16351        let table = get_charset_table(CharacterSetId::BasicCyrillic);
16352        assert_eq!(table.get(&0xA1), Some(&(0x0410u32, false))); // CYRILLIC CAPITAL LETTER A
16353    }
16354}
